about.title: Learning, we design am around how people dey really learn
about.subtitle: DextaLearning take plenty years of learning science build one platform where to finish — and to remember — na the normal thing.
about.mission_body: To make deep learning wey go last the normal thing, no be exception — for every teacher, for every classroom.

science.title: Science pass hype
science.body: Every feature dey based on evidence of how memory and motivation dey really work.

finish.title: To finish dey important
finish.body: To start easy. We design for the harder, better part — to finish.

access.title: We build am for everybody
access.body: Mobile-first, plenty languages, and low data — learning wey go meet you where you dey.

about.cta_body: Start free and see how to learn the correct way dey feel.

community.title: You dey learn faster when you no dey alone
community.subtitle: Cohorts, groups, and one community of teachers wey dey grow together.

cohorts.title: Join one cohort
cohorts.body: Learn with your padi, one facilitator, and one deadline wey una share.

groups.title: Find your group
groups.body: Small peer group dey keep you accountable and motivated.

share.title: Share your story
share.body: Inspire others with how learning change your teaching.

community.cta_body: Open free account and find your people.
